message:
feat(setup): Support verified_installer metadata in setup endpoints (bd-3g6l)

- Add VerifiedInstallerSpec type to shared tool-registry types
- Add verifiedInstaller field to ToolDefinition interface
- Add Zod schema for verifiedInstaller validation
- Update ToolInfo to include verifiedInstaller metadata
- Prefer verified_installer over install array in toToolInfo()
- Handle runInTmux flag in installTool() for interactive installs
- Include install source in structured logging

Surfaces runner, args, fallback_url, run_in_tmux from ACFS manifest
in /setup/tools and /setup/install endpoints. For install endpoint,
prefers verified_installer if present, otherwise installCommand.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-3huq","title":"Config + feature flags for NTM integration","description":"Goal:
- Add configuration controls for NTM integration.

Scope:
- Enable/disable NTM driver, poll interval, timeouts, session naming.
- Safe defaults and env var documentation.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit: bd-2nr0 (config gating + defaults).

Definition of Done:
- Config is documented and used by NTM services.","notes":"Implementation:
- Added ntmConfigSchema to config.service.ts with:
  - enabled: boolean (default: true)
  - pollIntervalMs: number (default: 5000)
  - commandTimeoutMs: number (default: 10000)
  - maxBackoffMultiplier: number (default: 6)
  - wsBridge sub-config for WebSocket bridge settings
- Added env var overrides:
  - NTM_ENABLED, NTM_POLL_INTERVAL_MS, NTM_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS
  - NTM_MAX_BACKOFF_MULTIPLIER, NTM_WS_BRIDGE_ENABLED
  - NTM_WS_TAIL_POLL_INTERVAL_MS, NTM_WS_THROTTLING_ENABLED
- Updated index.ts to:
  - Load config at startup
  - Conditionally start NTM services based on config.ntm.enabled
  - Pass config values to NtmIngestService and NtmWsBridgeService
- All tests pass (12 throttling tests)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:09:31.379888486Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T21:29:26.491844732Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T21:29:26.491664343Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["config","ntm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3huq","depends_on_id":"bd-1khz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:11:31.455548218Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3huq","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:09:31.577693777Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
